nasb.text: Then Zimri went in and struck him and put him to death in the twenty-seventh year of Asa king of Judah, and became king in his place.

esv.text: Zimri came in and struck him down and killed him, in the twenty-seventh year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 心利就進去擊打他，把他殺死了，接續他作王，這事發生在猶大王亞撒第二十七年。

ccb.text: 进去杀了他，篡了位。那一年是亚撒做犹大王第二十七年。
